assertions.title: Milestone 1 auth routes are available under /auth/*

steps.observed: Endpoints return JSON responses (mostly 400s due to empty payloads or 200 for session)

evidence.network: Recorded curl transcripts for register/begin, register/finish, login/begin, login/finish, session, and logout

assertions.title: Session inspection reports signed-out state for missing, bogus, or expired session artifacts
Auth begin endpoints reject malformed input cleanly

evidence.network: Recorded invalid request transcripts for register/begin and login/begin

assertions.title: Registration begin returns WebAuthn options bound to draft.choir-ip.com

steps.observed: Returned JSON with challenge and rp.id=draft.choir-ip.com

assertions.title: Login begin returns assertion options for the implemented registered-passkey flow on draft.choir-ip.com
assertions.issues: Blocked because we cannot create a registered passkey user via pure curl without a browser passkey ceremony.

assertions.title: Invalid, stale, or replayed finish payloads fail closed and do not mint a session

steps.observed: Skipped due to inability to create valid payload via curl

evidence.network: Recorded tampered-finish failure and subsequent session proof transcripts

assertions.issues: Tampered payload failure verified, but full assertion blocked because replay testing requires a valid passkey ceremony which cannot be completed via curl.

assertions.title: Authenticated session inspection returns current user identity without secrets
assertions.issues: Blocked: Cannot obtain an authenticated session via pure curl.

assertions.title: Logout invalidates access and refresh state and is safe to repeat
assertions.issues: Blocked: Cannot obtain an authenticated session via pure curl to test valid logout invalidation.

blockers.description: Cannot complete real WebAuthn passkey ceremonies via pure curl. This blocks generating valid sessions or registering users for testing login, replay, authenticated session inspection, and logout behavior.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Attempted to hit login/begin with a testusername, but it correctly returned 404 because no passkey is registered. Verified failure behavior for 006, but cannot verify replay.

summary: Tested 8 assertions: 4 passed, 4 blocked due to inability to perform passkey ceremonies via curl.
